name: Content Filter
description: Filter out low-quality, too-short, non-English, or irrelevant scraped pages

options.name: min_word_count
options.label: Minimum word count
options.description: Pages with fewer words are excluded. Catches empty/stub pages.

options.name: drop_errors
options.label: Drop error/skipped pages
options.description: Automatically exclude pages that failed scraping (status = error or skipped).

options.name: require_english
options.label: Require English content
options.description: Exclude pages where the first 200 characters lack common English stop words. Catches non-English pages without external dependencies.

options.name: exclude_title_keywords
options.label: Exclude title keywords (comma-separated)
options.description: Pages with these words in the title are excluded. E.g. 'cookie,privacy,terms,login,404'.

options.name: exclude_url_patterns
options.label: Exclude URL patterns (comma-separated)
options.description: Safety net — pages matching these URL patterns are excluded. Note: overlaps with Step 2 url-filter; only catches items that bypassed or weren't run through url-filter.
